---
title: "Pyrra Discovery Platform"
page-layout: article
---

# Pyrra Discovery Platform

## Description

Research platform for monitoring online narratives, emerging communities, and digital information environments. Supports analysis of public discourse, media ecosystems, and online activity.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, News & Media, Technology & Innovation
- **Data/resource type:** Data Platform
- **Access model:** Request Required
- **Displayed topic:** Data Platform

## Links

- [Request access](https://forms.office.com/pages/responsepage.aspx?id=u76M3Tkh-E20EU4-h6vrXGa2PpecL_VHoOa9Jy4XGNVUMjVEOEYzTUVPMFJYOTdSNlQwTk4zSFFBVyQlQCN0PWcu&route=shorturl)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
